title: Image Classification with Unbalanced Dataset
scenario: Write a prompt to classify a set of images into predefined categories (animals, vehicles, landmarks), given an unbalanced dataset with varying levels of image quality. The LLM output should be in the format of a CSV table with image class, confidence level, and image features. Target output should include at least 20 images, with each category represented and the highest confidence levels.
constraints: Must handle images with varying levels of quality and resolution.
Must be robust to unbalanced dataset conditions.
Must provide confidence levels and image features for each classification.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the LLM output conform to the expected CSV format?
Does the LLM correctly classify images into predefined categories?
Does the LLM accurately calculate confidence levels for each classification?
Does the LLM accurately extract and provide image features for each classification?
